title: Why Researchers Must Share Findings Beyond Journals
subtitle: 纳税人资助的研究，为何锁在付费期刊里？

paragraphs.en: Research is meant to benefit society by raising public awareness and creating products and innovations that enhance development. For research to serve its full purpose, the results must leave the confines of research laboratories and academic journals. Findings effectively communicated can go a long way to serve the interests of the public.
paragraphs.zh: 研究的宗旨在于通过提高公众认知、创造促进发展的产品和创新来造福社会。要使研究充分发挥其作用，成果就必须走出研究实验室和学术期刊的局限。有效传播研究发现，能够极大地服务于公众利益。

paragraphs.en: They can help address social injustices or improve treatments offered to patients. Many researchers seem to be content with sharing the results of their studies in academic journals or at conferences. But few journals allow everybody to read the findings. Even articles freely available are usually written in academic language incomprehensible to the average reader.
paragraphs.zh: 它们有助于解决社会不公，或改善提供给患者的治疗方案。然而许多研究人员似乎满足于仅在学术期刊或会议上分享研究结果。但很少有期刊允许所有人免费阅读这些成果。即便那些可免费获取的文章，也通常以普通读者难以理解的学术语言写成。

paragraphs.en: For researchers in the tenure-track system, their main goal is winning tenure, which in part can be achieved by getting a number of papers published in prominent journals. Pressures like this mean community-level outreach is not prioritised. Many researchers lack the writing skills to describe their results to a general audience.
paragraphs.zh: 对于处于终身教职轨道的研究人员而言，其主要目标是获得终身教职，而这在一定程度上可通过在知名期刊上发表一定数量的论文来实现。诸如此类的压力意味着面向社区层面的外展工作并未得到优先考虑。许多研究人员缺乏向普通受众描述其研究成果的写作技巧。

words.meaning: n. 外展服务；延伸服务

paragraphs.en: They may also worry about whether the public will understand their findings, or about findings being used to influence controversial policies. These concerns cause some researchers to shy away from communicating their findings outside the academic community. Propagating research findings beyond academic publications is particularly crucial for addressing certain social discrepancies.
paragraphs.zh: 他们或许还担心公众能否理解其发现，或担心研究结果被用于影响有争议的政策。这些顾虑导致部分研究人员回避在学术界之外传播其成果。将研究发现传播到学术出版物之外，对于解决某些社会差异尤为关键。

paragraphs.en: It can help families, communities, healthcare providers, policymakers, government agencies and other stakeholders to understand and respond to crises that plague society. The benefits of sharing findings flow both ways. Engaging with other researchers and the public can lead to unexpected new connections and new ideas that could suggest fruitful new directions for research.
paragraphs.zh: 它能帮助家庭、社区、医疗服务提供者、政策制定者、政府机构及其他利益相关方理解并应对困扰社会的危机。分享研究发现的好处是双向的。与其他研究人员及公众互动，可能催生意想不到的新联系和新想法，为研究指明富有成果的新方向。

paragraphs.en: To benefit both researchers and the communities, the need to find innovative, accessible ways to share the work cannot be overstated. Institutions and funding organisations should support more researchers to publish in open access journals so that the public doesn't have to pay to read them. Institutions and researchers should invest in partnerships that expand capacity for sharing results more broadly.
paragraphs.zh: 为了同时惠及研究人员和社区，寻找创新、易懂的成果分享途径的需求再怎么强调也不为过。各机构和资助组织应支持更多研究人员在开放获取期刊上发表成果，让公众无需付费即可阅读。各机构和研究人员应投资于能够扩大成果共享范围的合作伙伴关系。

paragraphs.en: Furthermore, ethics committees should make it mandatory for researchers to share their results with the public. Every research participant should opt in or out of receiving results, as part of the process of giving informed consent. There could be misunderstanding of the findings presented by the researcher because of technical terms.
paragraphs.zh: 此外，伦理委员会应强制要求研究人员向公众分享其结果。作为知情同意流程的一部分，每位研究参与者都应有权选择是否接收研究结果。由于专业术语的存在，研究人员呈现的研究发现可能会被误解。

paragraphs.en: But this can be resolved by researchers engaging the services of professional writers or communication officers to help with translating their study into more accessible language and share it widely with media outlets and the public. Sharing results with the people who are most affected by them makes us better researchers and ensures that our work can be used to improve people's lives. Institutions and collaborators must recognise the value of doing so.
paragraphs.zh: 但这一问题可以通过聘请专业写手或传播官员来解决，他们能帮助研究人员将研究转化为更通俗易懂的语言，并广泛分享给媒体和公众。与受研究结果影响最深的人群分享成果，能让我们成为更好的研究者，并确保我们的工作能被用来改善人们的生活。各机构与合作者必须认识到这样做的价值。
